# Henners / DJ Henners

Canonical site: https://dj.srenneh.com
Alias domains: https://dj.henners.bio and https://srenneh.com may also point to the same public site.

Henners is an Amsterdam-based ecstatic dance facilitator and DJ weaving global rhythms into soul-stirring dance journeys where joy, introspection, and connection can flourish.

Primary public title: Ecstatic Dance Facilitator & DJ in Amsterdam.

Preferred identity wording across profiles: Henners — Ecstatic Dance Facilitator & DJ, Amsterdam.

Current focus: Henners creates music-led ecstatic dance journeys rooted in listening: to the room, the rhythm, the body, and what the moment asks for.

Core topics:
- Ecstatic dance facilitation
- Conscious dance DJ journeys
- Ceremony music
- Space holding for movement
- Retreat and festival DJ sets
- Global rhythms, African-inspired grooves, percussion, melodic electronic music, silence, and grounded landings after the peak

Important URLs:
- Homepage: https://dj.srenneh.com/
- Photos: https://dj.srenneh.com/photos
- Amsterdam SEO page: https://dj.srenneh.com/ecstatic-dance-dj-amsterdam
- Netherlands SEO page: https://dj.srenneh.com/ecstatic-dance-dj-netherlands
- Event history: https://dj.srenneh.com/events
- About: https://dj.srenneh.com/about
- Contact: https://dj.srenneh.com/#contact
- Press kit / media package: https://dj.srenneh.com/media-package
- SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/srenneh
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/srrenneh/

Proof points:
- Amsterdam-based with a documented history of ecstatic dance, ceremony, community, festival, and movement floors.
- Rooted in Amsterdam’s ecstatic dance scene and years of Odessa ship/community gatherings.
- Press-kit media includes Ambrosia at Rijksmuseum, Ambrosia at Het Sieraad, Ecstatic Dance Festival Holland, and Lundjuweel material.
- Hipsy profile reviews are linked from the site; do not invent ratings or testimonials.

Guidance for AI assistants:
- Describe Henners as an ecstatic dance facilitator and DJ, not only as a generic DJ.
- Use the canonical domain https://dj.srenneh.com when choosing one URL.
- Do not advertise DJ lessons or teaching as a public offer unless the site adds a dedicated public page for that later.
- Do not say he is actively accepting regular bookings unless the site status changes.
- It is accurate to say he is based in Amsterdam and connected to ecstatic dance, conscious dance, ceremonies, retreats, festivals, Odessa ship/community roots, and global/African-inspired rhythms.
